aorsf 0.0.6

    PD and ICE curves with ORSF Out-of-bag predictions and evaluation
  • Changelog

Coerce to data.table

Source: R/orsf_summary.R
as.data.table.orsf_summary_uni.Rd

Convert an 'orsf_summary' object into a data.table object.

Usage

# S3 method for orsf_summary_uni
as.data.table(x, ...)

Arguments

x

an object of class 'orsf_summary_uni'

...

not used

Value

a data.table

Examples


library(data.table)

object <- orsf(pbc_orsf, Surv(time, status) ~ . - id)

smry <- orsf_summarize_uni(object, n_variables = 3)

as.data.table(smry)
#>    variable importance value      mean      medn        lwr       upr
#> 1:     bili 0.08058971  0.80 0.2355574 0.1181641 0.04539239 0.3643395
#> 2:     bili 0.08058971   1.4 0.2570242 0.1393118 0.05796953 0.4057795
#> 3:     bili 0.08058971   3.5 0.3800264 0.2932956 0.16863027 0.5657635
#> 4:   copper 0.03125651    43 0.2638036 0.1400297 0.04183701 0.4760245
#> 5:   copper 0.03125651    74 0.2824421 0.1511454 0.05160522 0.4945920
#> 6:   copper 0.03125651   130 0.3411209 0.2279802 0.11186792 0.5519923
#> 7:      age 0.02578662    41 0.2757047 0.1340417 0.03964681 0.4637147
#> 8:      age 0.02578662    50 0.3023996 0.1609776 0.04469094 0.5211028
#> 9:      age 0.02578662    57 0.3332841 0.2180562 0.06766140 0.5658505
#>    pred_horizon level
#> 1:         1788  <NA>
#> 2:         1788  <NA>
#> 3:         1788  <NA>
#> 4:         1788  <NA>
#> 5:         1788  <NA>
#> 6:         1788  <NA>
#> 7:         1788  <NA>
#> 8:         1788  <NA>
#> 9:         1788  <NA>
